risk_if_not_implemented: Without Component Marking, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Media Marking
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to mark media in accordance with data protection requirements so that personnel are alerted to distribution limitations, handling caveats and applicable security requirements.
compensating_control_1.justification: Media Marking (DCH-04) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Component Marking (PES-16) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Facility applicability. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Asset Inventories
compensating_control_2.justification: Asset Inventories (AST-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Component Marking (PES-16) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Facility applicability. Given the facility and physical environment focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
